0x15337bc0.name: invalidateOrder
0x15337bc0.reason: user on-chain order cancellation (owner-checked: msg.sender must be order owner) -> amm cancel_intent_order (venue=cow_swap). orderUid carries no terms, but cancel semantics are terms-free.

0xec6cb13f.name: setPreSignature
0xec6cb13f.reason: smart-contract-wallet (e.g. Safe) on-chain order placement: signed=true marks the orderUid PRE_SIGNED (tradable/commit), signed=false revokes (cancel) -> amm pre_sign_intent_order (venue=cow_swap). The opaque orderUid (56B: 32B digest + 20B owner + 4B validTo) carries no sell/buy/amount terms in calldata (those live in the off-chain order keyed by the digest; CoW orderbook API is the enrichment source), so the action exposes venue + order_hash + signed and leaves terms unmodelled rather than fabricated. This is the SC-wallet analog of the dominant off-chain EIP-712 Order signature (covered via signed_structs.Order); an EOA never calls setPreSignature.

0x13d79a0b.name: settle
0x13d79a0b.reason: solver-only (onlySolver, allowlisted via GPv2AllowListAuthentication); batch settlement, not a user pre-sign action.

0x845a101f.name: swap
0x845a101f.reason: solver-only (onlySolver); single-order settlement routed through the Balancer V2 vault.

0xed9f35ce.name: freeFilledAmountStorage
0xed9f35ce.reason: onlyInteraction: callable only mid-settlement by Settlement itself; storage cleanup, not user-facing.

0xa2a7d51b.name: freePreSignatureStorage
0xa2a7d51b.reason: onlyInteraction: mid-settlement pre-signature storage cleanup; not user-facing.

0xf84436bd.name: simulateDelegatecall
0xf84436bd.reason: simulation helper (delegatecall in a staticcall/simulation context); not a real state-changing user action.

0x43218e19.name: simulateDelegatecallInternal
0x43218e19.reason: internal simulation helper invoked by simulateDelegatecall; not user-facing.

Order.reason: off-chain EIP-712 Order signature (domain 'Gnosis Protocol' v2, verifyingContract=this Settlement, primaryType=Order) -> amm sign_intent_order (venue=cow_swap). The dominant CowSwap user action (gasless intent).
